hero_subheading: Access financial assistance, education, employment, and support schemes — all in one centralized digital portal designed for your growth.
hero_trust_desc: Over 4.5 Lakh beneficiaries supported since inception
service_scholarship_desc: Pre-matric and post-matric financial assistance for students.

service_grievance_desc: File a complaint or report issues for quick resolution.
service_eligibility_desc: Quickly find out which schemes you qualify for.
schemes_subtitle: Tailored programs to support education, skill-building, and livelihoods.
scheme_driver_desc: Subsidized loans and skill training for professional heavy light vehicle driving.
scheme_overseas_desc: Financial assistance for students pursuing higher education in foreign universities.
scheme_skill_desc: Empowering youth through specialised job-oriented training programs.
scheme_subsidy_desc: Small business loans with attractive subsidies for self-employment.
eligibility_title: Find the Right Scheme for You
eligibility_subtitle: Answer 3 simple questions to see your eligible benefits.
testimonial_quote: The Overseas Education Grant helped me pursue my Master's in Data Science in the UK. I am now working at a top tech firm and supporting my family back in Medak.
about_hero_subtitle: Empowering minority communities through strategic financial support, education, and institutional welfare.
about_mandate_desc: The Telangana Christian Minorities Finance Corporation was established with a clear vision to act as a bridge between the state's resources and the Christian minority population.
about_mandate_item2: Provision of educational loans and merit scholarships.
about_mandate_item3: Support for self-employment through bank-linked subsidies.
about_mandate_item4: Skill development training for minority youth.
about_vision_desc: To foster an inclusive society where the Christian minority has equal access to educational and economic opportunities, ensuring dignity and sustainable growth for every citizen.
about_mission_desc: To uplift and empower communities through welfare programs, financial subsidies for livelihoods, and high-impact educational scholarship programs across all 33 districts.
about_hierarchy_subtitle: The formal structure of command and compliance
about_progress_desc: Our reach spans across the entire landscape of Telangana, touching lives in every administrative block.
about_charter_subtitle: Our commitment to time-based service delivery.
about_rti_desc: Public information under Right to Information Act 2005. Address correspondence to:
about_gallery_subtitle: Visual journey of our welfare initiatives across Telangana
about_cta_desc: Quickly navigate to our core resources or get in touch with our district support team for assistance.
contact_hero_subtitle: Find your nearest TGCMFC office, connect with officials, or reach out to head office for assistance.
contact_address_value: Minorities Bhawan, 5th Floor, Nampally, Hyderabad - 500001, Telangana
contact_directory_subtitle: All 33 districts with dedicated officers and contact details
contact_cta_desc: If you can't find your district office or need specialized help, submit a grievance or visit our FAQ section.
schemes_hero_subtitle: Empowering Christian Minorities through financial assistance, educational support, and professional training initiatives in Telangana.
schemes_no_results: No schemes found matching your criteria.
schemes_cta_heading: Not sure which scheme is right for you?
schemes_cta_desc: Tell us a bit about yourself, and our intelligent assistant will suggest the most relevant government schemes for your profile.
lang_advisor_desc: We detected your language as {{lang}}. Would you like to switch?
media_hero_subtitle: Stay updated with the latest announcements, events, and success stories from the Sovereign heart of Telangana.
media_featured_title: New Scholarship Scheme 2025 Launched for Higher Education
media_featured_excerpt: The Telangana Christian Minorities Finance Corporation announces a historic expansion of the post-matric scholarship program, reaching...
media_success_quote: TGCMFC didn't just give me a grant, they gave me a career.
media_testimonial_quote: Through the Self-Employment scheme, I was able to expand my bakery into three different locations across Hyderabad.
media_impact_desc: Our programs have reached every corner of the state, creating lasting change.
media_cta_title: Subscribe for the latest updates from TGCMFC
media_cta_desc: Receive official announcements, scheme launch dates, and important media releases directly in your inbox.
apply_success_desc: We have received your application for the Educational Scholarship Scheme. Our trustees will now begin the verification process. You can track your status anytime through your dashboard.
apply_info_email_desc: A copy of your receipt has been sent to your registered email address.
apply_info_verify_desc: Standard processing time for verification is 7-10 working days.
apply_info_alert_desc: You will receive SMS updates at every stage of the approval process.
apply_protip: Pro-tip: Keep your Aadhaar linked to your bank account for direct benefit transfer.
apply_eligibility_desc: The first step in your journey toward financial empowerment. Let's verify your status for the TGCMFC Modern Trustee scheme.
apply_income_question: What is your annual income range?
apply_eligible_desc: You meet the core criteria for this trustee program.
apply_not_eligible_desc: This scheme is for Christian minorities only.
apply_personal_desc: Step 2 of 4: Provide your identification and residency information.
apply_docs_desc: Step 3 of 4: Please provide authentic digital copies of your credentials.
apply_docs_format: Accepted file formats: PDF, JPG, PNG (Max 5MB per file)
apply_doc_hint_upload: Drag & Drop or Click to upload
apply_review_desc: Please review all your details carefully before final submission. Once submitted, your application will enter the verification phase.
apply_certify_label: I certify that all the information provided is correct.
apply_certify_desc: I understand that any false information may lead to the rejection of my application and potential legal action under corporate bylaws.
apply_submission_tip_desc: Ensure your Aadhaar is linked to the mobile number provided to receive the final OTP confirmation.
footer_about_text: The Telangana Christian (Minorities) Finance Corporation is dedicated to the progress and prosperity of Christian Minorities in the state through targeted financial and social interventions.
footer_address: 6th Floor, Haj House, Opp: Public Garden, Nampally, Hyderabad, Telangana - 500001
footer_copyright: Telangana Christian (Minorities) Finance Corporation. All Rights Reserved.
grievance_submit_subtitle: Submit and track your complaints easily. Your feedback helps us serve you better with institutional integrity.
grievance_form_desc_placeholder: Describe your grievance in detail. Please include application IDs or specific dates if applicable.
grievance_form_docs_limit: Max file size 5MB. Support for PDF, PNG, JPG.
grievance_success_hint: Save this ID to track your grievance status.
grievance_guide_1: Ensure your mobile number is verified for SMS updates.
grievance_guide_2: Provide a clear description to ensure faster resolution.
grievance_guide_3: Resolution period is typically 7-15 working days.
grievance_track_sla_desc: Our commitment to transparency ensures a maximum response time of 72 working hours for all institutional grievances.
grievance_dash_l1_desc: Verification and assignment to relevant departmental head for investigation.
grievance_dash_l2_desc: Comprehensive grievance addressing, field audits, and official closure reporting.
scheme_shortdesc_post_matric_scholarship: Providing 100% tuition reimbursement for higher studies in professional and technical courses.
scheme_shortdesc_driver_empowerment: Financial assistance for purchase of four-wheelers and commercial vehicles for livelihood.
scheme_shortdesc_skill_training_pro: Job-oriented skill development training for unemployed Christian youth in IT and Service sectors.
scheme_shortdesc_church_repair_grant: Financial assistance for the construction/repair/renovation of Christian community buildings.
scheme_shortdesc_economic_support: Providing subsidy for setting up small business units like Kirana, Tailoring, or Laundry.
scheme_shortdesc_overseas_study_grant: Scholarship of up to ₹20 Lakhs for eligible students pursuing PG/Ph.D studies in Foreign universities.
scheme_shortdesc_critical_medical_aid: One-time financial grant for surgery and specialized treatment in major hospitals for the community.
scheme_shortdesc_computer_training: Free certificate courses in web development, data entry, and digital marketing for youth.
scheme_shortdesc_civils_coaching: Sponsorship for coaching fees for UPSC and State PSC exams at premier institutes.
